title: Global Digital Compact (GDC)
description: UN framework for international cooperation on digital and emerging technologies, adopted by Member States in September 2024. Explicitly recognises open source, open AI models, and open access to training data and compute.

provenance.source_title: UN Open Source Week 2025 Conference Report (RISE 2026:04)
provenance.locator: Introduction; Day 3 and DPI Day keynotes (Amandeep Singh Gill)

title: Open Source AI Definition (OSAID) v1.0
description: Version 1.0 of the Open Source Initiative's definition of open source AI, introduced by Stefano Maffulli, extending openness beyond code to training data, documentation, governance, and safety.

provenance.source_title: UN Open Source Week 2025 Conference Report (RISE 2026:04)
provenance.locator: Day 2 Breakout 2: Advancing Open Source AI for the Public Good

title: Mind the AI Divide
description: Joint UN-ODET and International Labour Organization (ILO) report introducing a framework for assessing AI's impact on the workforce, with early findings on the ICT sector.

provenance.source_title: UN Open Source Week 2025 Conference Report (RISE 2026:04)

title: Digital Public Goods (DPG) Standard
description: The Digital Public Goods Alliance standard setting requirements for classifying software, data, AI systems, and content as digital public goods.

provenance.source_title: UN Open Source Week 2025 Conference Report (RISE 2026:04)
provenance.locator: Day 2 Breakout 2 (Amreen Taneja, DPG Standard Lead, DPGA)

title: Universal DPI Safeguards Framework
description: A dynamic framework built by UN-ODET with UNDP to address risk while unlocking the benefits of Digital Public Infrastructure, integrating safeguards by design.

provenance.source_title: UN Open Source Week 2025 Conference Report (RISE 2026:04)

title: UN Open Source Principles
description: Principles launched by UN-OICT to guide open source adoption, endorsed by 80 organizations including the Government of France.

provenance.source_title: UN Open Source Week 2025 Conference Report (RISE 2026:04)

title: UN Open Source Policy Framework
description: Framework launched to guide UN agencies in effectively adopting open source software.

provenance.source_title: UN Open Source Week 2025 Conference Report (RISE 2026:04)

title: UN Open Source Catalogue
description: A collection of open source tools developed internally within the United Nations.

provenance.source_title: UN Open Source Week 2025 Conference Report (RISE 2026:04)

title: Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs)
description: The UN's 17 Sustainable Development Goals, repeatedly cited as the impact frame for open source, digital public goods, and DPI throughout the week.

provenance.source_title: UN Open Source Week 2025 Conference Report (RISE 2026:04)
